title: NBA Finals New York Front Page Poster AI Prompt
sourceTitle: NBA Finals New York Front Page Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Black-and-white newspaper front-page NBA Finals poster about New York’s historic Game 4 comeback, centered on New York skyline and Madison Square Garden as the hero, with Jalen Brunson number 11 and OG Anunoby number 8 in New York Knicks uniforms. Subject: New York skyline and Madison Square Garden as the hero, with Jalen Brunson number 11 and OG Anunoby number 8 in New York Knicks uniforms frames New York itself as the hero while Brunson appears as floor general and OG as the putback finisher. Scene: Dramatic Manhattan skyline and Madison Square Garden printed as the central newspaper structure with gritty city scale, sports history mood, and Knicks comeback energy. Composition: Vertical 4:5 front page layout: masthead headline at top, skyline and Garden as the main structure, player cutouts integrated as sports-news elements, moment line and score footer locked into newspaper hierarchy. Signature Elements: Preserved nba finals new york front page newspaper poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Black-and-white halftone, distressed newspaper ink, photocopied sports zine texture, cream paper grain, premium historical sports print, and archival front-page drama. Color Palette: Black ink, cream newspaper paper, grey halftone shading, restrained Knicks graphic cues, and high-contrast sports-zine texture. Lighting: Print-based contrast with halftone shadows, strong headline clarity, and dramatic ink density around skyline, Garden, and player cutouts. Typography: 53 YEARS AT THE DOOR / One win from first title since 1973 / 29 down. 1.2 left. One putback. / Knicks 107 / Spurs 106 / Knicks lead 3-1 appears as the masthead headline, subheadline, moment line, score footer, NBA Finals 2026 stamp, and Knicks wordmark-style newspaper elements. Restrictions: Keep New York, Knicks, Brunson, OG, Spurs score context, and NBA Finals identity recognizable;

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
